channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 5th July
item.description:
Large amount of general household waste strewn across pavement making pavement impassable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: HMO have dumped bags of clothing on the street, 5th July
item.description:
Unable to take photo as tenants are not friendly. 2 bags of clothes dumped on pavement. Has been there over a day.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Hearns Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 5th July
item.description:
Large amount of dumped garden waste making pavement impassable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stones from pothole, 5th July
item.description:
Over the past couple of months, a shallow pot hole has developed, which has resulted in stones from the deteriorated road surface spreading across the road and pavement. These stones are around 4-5cm in diameter and pose a risk to pedestrians. Many of the residents in the street are older and have mobility issues, and I believe the stones may be an accident waiting to happen. If someone could come along and clear the debris that would really help.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alton Close, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is not recycling, 5th July
item.description:
This is fly tipping and has been going on for too long. The local authority needs to consider preventative measures to prevent this impacting the nearby green areas and wildlife.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Eden Park Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Sign Worn out, 5th July
item.description:
Midfield Avenue Road Sign falling apart. Please can it be renewed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Midfield Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double mattress outside No4/6 Talbot Rd, 5th July
item.description:
Dumped mattress.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole around drain cover, 5th July
item.description:
Large pothole around drain cover causing debris to spill across road from loose stones.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westgate Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car blocking footpath, 5th July
item.description:
Red car blocking pedestrian footpath, approximately 30 minutes so far
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ivorydown, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mounds of Rubbish left in building recess, 5th July
item.description:
Lots of rubbish abandoned in recess on Highshore Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mechanic working on the whole street, 5th July
item.description:
We have been living peacefully on Montpelier rise its a peaceful road with no disturbances. Over the last 2 years our peace has been destroyed due the the mechanics working on Montpelier way around the corner.They work there day and night. We have lost alot of parking spaces. Our friends who come to visit have nowhere to park on Montpelier way-even though they are willing to pay for parking. It is destroying our lives and the lives of our neighbours. They are using a public street as a private garage. Please can you stop this immediately!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Montpelier Rise, Brent Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fly tip behind sub station again, 5th July
item.description:
Dumped behind sub station again
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Camelot Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandonned, stripped out car, 5th July
item.description:
Abandonned car stationed here for many months, no wheels fitted and empty shell inside

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Perch Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 5th July
item.description:
Someone has placed a kingsized mattresses, chest of drawers and some pins on the corner of Piano Lane and outside 53 Carysfort Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carysfort Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water needed urgently due to heatwave, 5th July
item.description:
There is a number of young trees in different parts of the park that need extra support, near Pavilion 2, Cow shed, children's playground, and the Mencap Lodge. Given the fact that the heatwave is to continue next week with no rain on the horizon, can we make sure that the young trees do not succumb to the weather unnecessarily, please. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Common, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip behind bushes, 5th July
item.description:
There is a fly tip behind the bushes that has been there for at least 3 days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkway, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1-27 Kennoldes estate, 5th July
item.description:
We found a stolen bike still parked in parking area so please fix it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Spenser Mews, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branch fallen, 5th July
item.description:
A large branch has fallen from one of the trees on Tyler Street.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colomb Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The car is abandoned, 5th July
item.description:
Parking is free on our street, so everyone parks here. Lately, it's been really hard to find a spot. There's this one abandoned car with a flat tire that definitely hasn't moved since we bought our house and moved in. Getting rid of it would open up at least one more parking space for residents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manordene Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal driving on footpath, 5th July
item.description:
Increase volume of notepad and E scooters riding on footpath near children’s playground and Community space. Dangerous driving illegally on pavements

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hambrook Road, South Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
